EttersendDokuPanel.title: Send documentation for an application you have submitted

text.p1: Documentation can be sent to applications you have previously submitted.
text.p2: Go to the list of <lenke>your social assistance applications</lenke>
text.p3: Open the application that you would like to forward documentation to
text.p4: Upload the documents you are going to send under “Your documents”

PabegynteSoknaderPanel.title: Continue with an application you have started
PabegynteSoknaderPanel.pabegynte: {count, plural, =1 {One started application} other {# started applications}}
PabegynteSoknaderPanel.slettesEtter: Please note that the started applications will be deleted after {count} days.

NySoknadInfo.feilet: An error occurred when setting up the application. Please try later

InnsendteSoknaderVarsel.oneLeft: You have sent {antall} application in the last 24 hours. At {maxAntall} applications, the digital application for financial assistance will be blocked for 24 hours.
InnsendteSoknaderVarsel.blockedWithDate: You have sent {antall} applications in the last 24 hours, and therefore cannot send more applications for financial assistance before {innsendingTillattFra}.

text.p1: Please complete the application as best you can. Attach relevant documentation.
text.p2: See examples of <lenke>what documentation we might ask for</lenke>.
text.p3: If you intentionally withhold or provide incorrect information, you may have to pay back the benefit.

innhenting.title: Collecting and processing of personal data

text.p1: We automatically collect information from public registers. By pressing "Start application" you accept this.
text.p2: <lenke>Read more about collecting and processing of your personal data</lenke>.

nodsituasjon.title: Are you in an emergency situation?
nodsituasjon.text: If you do not have money for food or a place to stay for the next 24 hours, you should mention this in your application.

SokerUnder18Feilmelding.title: To apply for financial assistance, you must be at least 18 years old.
SokerUnder18Feilmelding.text1: If you are under 18, you must have consent from your guardians to apply for financial social assistance.
SokerUnder18Feilmelding.text2: If you want to know more about consent or have questions about how this works, you can contact <lenke>your local Nav office</lenke> where you live or stay, or call us at <phone>55 55 33 33</phone>.

PersonbeskyttelseFeilmelding.title: Sorry
PersonbeskyttelseFeilmelding.text: Unfortunately, you cannot use the digital application for financial assistance. Contact your local <lenke>Nav office</lenke> to receive help applying.

TekniskFeil.title: We're sorry!
TekniskFeil.anbefaling: We recommend that you try again.
TekniskFeil.lenkeTilHovedmeny: To the home page for the application
TekniskFeil.problemetErLogget: The issue has been logged and the problem will be rectified as soon as possible.

TrengerDuRaskHjelp.title: Do you need immediate help?
TrengerDuRaskHjelp.kontaktKontoret: If you do not have money for necessary things such as food, you must contact your Nav office. Nav will also help you to find a temporary place of residence if you have nowhere to sleep or to stay in the next 24 hours.
TrengerDuRaskHjelp.papirAlternativ: You can also <lenke>apply for financial assistance on paper</lenke> at your Nav office.
TrengerDuRaskHjelp.lenkeTilHovedmeny: Go to the front page for financial assistance

IkkeFunnet.title: Page not found
IkkeFunnet.feilmelding: If this concerns a submitted/deleted application, return to the home page.
IkkeFunnet.lenkeTilHovedmeny: To the home page for the application

varig.forslag: You can <lenke>apply using a paper form</lenke>.

midlertidig.melding: {kommunenavn} municipality cannot accept digital applications right now.
midlertidig.forslag: <lenke>Apply using a paper form</lenke>, or try again later.

NavEnhet.blirSendtTil: Your application will be sent to:

NavYtelser.heading: Your payments from NAV
NavYtelser.empty: You have no payments registered from NAV in the last month.
NavYtelser.error: Due to a system fault we have not been able to obtain information about benefits from NAV.

NewDokumenter.label: Upload files
NewDokumenter.filLagtTil: {count, plural, one {# file added to the list.} other {# files added to the list.}}
NewDokumenter.filSlettet: {count, plural, =0 {File deleted. No files remaining.} one {File deleted. # file remaining.} other {File deleted. # files remaining.}}
NewDokumenter.konvertert: One or more files were changed to another format (PDF) so that it can be submitted.
NewDokumenter.processingWarning: Upload may take some time. The upload will be cancelled automatically after 3 minutes.

submissionError.TOO_MANY_FILES: You have selected too many files. The maximum number of files is 30.
submissionError.TOTAL_SIZE_TOO_LARGE: The files are too large (max 150 MB), remove files and try again.

NewDokumenter.mappeIkkeTillatt: Folders cannot be uploaded. Please select individual files instead.

FileUploadItem.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Please try again later.

validation.ENCRYPTED_PDF: The PDF is password protected and we cannot process it
validation.FILETYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED: The file type is not supported
validation.FILE_TOO_LARGE: The file is too large (max 10 MB)
validation.INVALID_FILENAME: The file name may only contain the letters a–å, the numbers 0–9 and the characters - _ . , ( )
validation.POSSIBLY_INFECTED: The file may be infected with a virus
